name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_PROJECTS
description: List all projects in the Azure DevOps organisation that the signed-in user has access to.

top.description: Maximum number of projects to return. (numeric ID as string)

skip.description: Number of projects to skip for pagination. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_PROJECT
description: Get details of a specific Azure DevOps project by name or ID, including description, visibility, and capabilities.

path.description: Path parameters to identify the project.

project_id.description: The project name or project ID (GUID).

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_REPOSITORIES
description: List all Git repositories in a specific Azure DevOps project. Returns repo names, URLs, default branches, and sizes.

project.description: The project name or ID containing the repositories.

includeHidden.description: Set to true to include hidden repositories.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_REPOSITORY
description: Get details of a specific Git repository including its default branch, clone URLs, size, and remote URL.

repository_id.description: The repository name or repository ID (GUID).

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_BRANCHES
description: List all branches in a Git repository. Returns branch names, latest commit info, and ahead/behind counts relative to default branch.

filter.description: Filter branches by prefix. e.g., 'heads/' for all branches, 'heads/feature' for feature branches.

top.description: Maximum number of branches to return. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_COMMITS
description: List commits in a Git repository with optional filters by branch, author, date range, or file path.

searchCriteria_itemVersion_version.description: Branch name to filter commits by.

searchCriteria_author.description: Filter by commit author name or email.

searchCriteria_fromDate.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format.

searchCriteria_toDate.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format.

top.description: Maximum number of commits to return. (numeric ID as string)

skip.description: Number of commits to skip for pagination. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_PULL_REQUESTS
description: List pull requests in a Git repository. Filter by status, creator, reviewer, or target branch.

query.description: Query parameters to filter pull requests.

searchCriteria_targetRefName.description: Filter by target branch (full ref name).

top.description: Maximum number of PRs to return. (numeric ID as string)

skip.description: Number of PRs to skip for pagination. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_PULL_REQUEST
description: Get full details of a specific pull request including description, reviewers, status, merge strategy, and comments.

path.description: Path parameters identifying the pull request.

pull_request_id.description: The pull request ID number. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__CREATE_PULL_REQUEST
description: Create a new pull request in a Git repository. Specify source branch, target branch, title, description, and reviewers.

examples: feat: add new payment gateway integration

description.description: Detailed description of the changes in this PR.
examples: This PR adds Stripe payment gateway support. Closes #234.

sourceRefName.description: Source branch full ref name (the branch with your changes).

targetRefName.description: Target branch full ref name (the branch to merge into).

reviewers.description: List of reviewer objects. Each object needs an 'id' (user GUID). Provide as a JSON array string.

isDraft.description: Set to true to create the PR as a draft.

workItemRefs.description: Work items to link to this PR. Each object needs an 'id' (work item ID as string). Provide as a JSON array string.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__UPDATE_PULL_REQUEST
description: Update an existing pull request — change status (approve/abandon/complete), update title, description, or target branch.

path.description: Path parameters identifying the pull request.

pull_request_id.description: The pull request ID number. (numeric ID as string)

body.description: Fields to update on the pull request.

examples: feat: add Stripe payment gateway integration

status.description: Update PR status. Use 'abandoned' to close, 'completed' to merge.

isDraft.description: Set to false to mark a draft PR as ready for review.

targetRefName.description: Change the target branch for the PR.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_WORK_ITEMS
description: Run a WIQL (Work Item Query Language) query to retrieve work items such as user stories, bugs, tasks, and epics with flexible filtering.

top.description: Maximum number of work items to return. (numeric ID as string)

query.description: WIQL query string to retrieve work items. Use SQL-like syntax with Work Item fields.
examples: SELECT [System.Id],[System.Title],[System.State],[System.AssignedTo] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project AND [System.State] <> 'Closed' ORDER BY [System.ChangedDate] DESC
SELECT [System.Id],[System.Title] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.WorkItemType] = 'Bug' AND [System.State] = 'Active' AND [System.AssignedTo] = @me

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_WORK_ITEM
description: Get full details of a specific work item by its ID, including all fields, relations, and history.

path.description: Path parameters identifying the work item.

work_item_id.description: The work item ID number. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__CREATE_WORK_ITEM
description: Create a new work item (User Story, Bug, Task, Epic, Feature) in an Azure DevOps project.

path.description: Path parameters identifying project and work item type.

work_item_type.description: The type of work item to create.

body.description: Fields to set on the new work item.

description.description: Detailed description of the work item.
examples: Users are timing out after 2FA step. Affects all browsers.

assigned_to.description: Email of the user to assign the work item to.

area_path.description: Area path for the work item.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__UPDATE_WORK_ITEM
description: Update fields on an existing work item — change state, assignee, priority, add comments, or update any field using JSON Patch.

path.description: Path parameters identifying the work item.

work_item_id.description: The work item ID to update. (numeric ID as string)

body.description: Fields to update on the work item.

title.description: Updated title of the work item.

state.description: Updated state of the work item.

assigned_to.description: Email of the user to reassign to.

comment.description: Comment to add to the work item history.
examples: Reproduced on staging. Assigning to Jane for fix.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_PIPELINES
description: List all pipelines (build and release) in an Azure DevOps project.

top.description: Maximum number of pipelines to return. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_PIPELINE_RUNS
description: Get recent runs of a specific pipeline. Shows run status, result, triggered by, start time, and duration.

pipeline_id.description: The pipeline ID number. (numeric ID as string)

top.description: Maximum number of runs to return. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__TRIGGER_PIPELINE
description: Trigger a new run of a specific pipeline. Optionally specify a branch, commit, or custom pipeline variables.

pipeline_id.description: The pipeline ID to trigger. (numeric ID as string)

resources.description: Resource overrides for the run — specify branch or commit. Provide as a JSON object string.

variables.description: Runtime variable overrides as key-value pairs. e.g., {"MY_VAR": {"value": "my-value"}} Provide as a JSON object string.

stagesToSkip.description: List of stage names to skip in this run. Provide as a JSON array string.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_TEAMS
description: List all teams in an Azure DevOps project. Useful for finding team IDs needed for board and sprint queries.

top.description: Maximum number of teams to return. (numeric ID as string)

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__LIST_SPRINTS
description: List all sprints (iterations) for a specific team in an Azure DevOps project. Returns sprint names, start dates, end dates, and status.

path.description: Path parameters identifying the project and team.

team.description: The team name or team ID.

name: AZURE_DEVOPS__GET_SPRINT_WORK_ITEMS
description: Get all work items assigned to a specific sprint for a team. Returns work item IDs which can then be fetched using GET_WORK_ITEM.
